rationale.P01: SEV1 by label only. filesystem_pressure_pct=41 vs threshold 40, metric history flat at the 38-42 baseline (39 before, 38.5 right after), 18 fires/hr, auto-resolved in 27s. pat-fs-pressure-raterule shows delta_vs_baseline_pct=2, neutral sentiment. Onset coincides with the mon-2026.05.20-rules deploy at 01:00 that introduced this threshold. Benign blip mislabeled SEV1.
rationale.P02: Same misconfigured rule (pat-fs-pressure-raterule, mon-2026.05.20-rules). 42 vs 40 on image-resize, metric flat at baseline, 22 fires/hr, cleared in 24s. Noise.
rationale.P03: Same misconfigured rule. 40.5 vs 40 on search, 26 fires/hr, cleared in 31s, metric back to 38.8. Noise.
rationale.P04: Same misconfigured rule. 41.5 vs 40 on recommendation, 19 fires/hr, cleared in 22s. Noise.
rationale.P05: Same misconfigured rule. 40.8 vs 40 on frontend, 30 fires/hr, cleared in 29s. Noise.
rationale.P06: Same misconfigured rule. 41.2 vs 40 on notifications, 17 fires/hr, cleared in 35s. Noise.
rationale.P07: Same misconfigured rule. 42.3 vs 40 on cart, 21 fires/hr, cleared in 26s. Noise.
rationale.P08: Same misconfigured rule. 40.2 vs 40 on orders, 28 fires/hr, cleared in 20s. Noise.
rationale.P09: Same misconfigured rule. 41.7 vs 40 on profile, 16 fires/hr, cleared in 33s. Noise.
rationale.P10: Same misconfigured rule. 40.6 vs 40 on inventory, 24 fires/hr, cleared in 38s. Noise.
rationale.P11: Same misconfigured rule. 41.9 vs 40 on media-proxy, 20 fires/hr, cleared in 23s. Noise.
rationale.P12: Same misconfigured rule. 40.4 vs 40 on geo-lookup, 25 fires/hr, cleared in 30s, metric back to 38.4. Noise.
rationale.P13: recommendation cpu 92 vs 90, GC pause pattern (delta 4, neutral), auto-resolved in 36s; metric back to 45 the next minute. Transient.
rationale.P14: frontend 5xx 0.08 during fe-2026.05.20-a rollout, pat-rollout-503 (delta 0, neutral), auto-resolved in 44s; metric back to 0.004. Deploy transient.
rationale.P15: payments db_pool_wait_ms 4200 vs 200, never auto-resolved, climbing (1100 at 02:15 -> 4200 at 02:19 -> 7300 at 02:30). pat-db-pool-exhausted surges ~12x from near-zero baseline, negative sentiment. Genuine SEV1, root of the payments pool-exhaustion incident. Must-page.
rationale.P16: log-archiver disk_usage_pct 85.4 vs 85, pat-disk-rotate (delta 0, neutral), 14 fires/hr, cleared in 19s, metric back to 83.1. Chronic rotation flapper.
rationale.P17: billing queue_depth 14800 matches already-open INC-9120 (pat-billing-backlog, owner oncall-payments). A human is already engaged; do not re-page.
rationale.P18: checkout http_5xx_rate 0.19 vs 0.05, never auto-resolved, sustained and rising (0.19 -> 0.24 -> 0.27 through 02:30). pat-checkout-5xx-regress surges from 0.006 baseline, negative sentiment, traces to checkout-2026.05.20-c. Genuine SEV2 error-rate regression that does NOT self-heal. Severity is lower than the noise but behavior is cardinal. Must-page.
rationale.P19: search p99 905 vs 800, cold-cache pattern (delta 6, neutral), 3 fires/hr, auto-resolved in 25s, metric back to 410. Transient.
rationale.P20: session-store memory_pct 91 vs 90, SEV3, never auto-resolved, monotonic slow-burn rise (91 -> 93.5 -> 95 -> 97 -> 98.5 over ~1h45m). pat-mem-creep delta 240, negative sentiment, no deploy to blame. Genuine slow-burn saturation; page-class. Non-must (miss_budget 1 tolerates a conservative model dropping it, at a cost to F1).
rationale.P21: image-resize cpu 91 vs 90, GC pause pattern, 2 fires/hr, auto-resolved in 32s; metric back to 46. Transient.
rationale.P22: payments p99 5600 vs 800, same pat-db-pool-exhausted root and onset window as P15 (within ~90s). Downstream symptom of the pool-exhaustion incident; collapse into P15 and suppress as a duplicate.

notes: PRECISION TRAP. A monitoring-rules deploy (mon-2026.05.20-rules, 01:00) introduced a misconfigured filesystem_pressure_pct rule that tags 12 benign blips (P01-P12) as SEV1 across the fleet. They LOOK urgent by severity but every behavioral feature says noise: value at/near the 38-42 historical baseline, high fired_count_last_1h (16-30), auto_resolved_after_s 20-38s, and a flat pat-fs-pressure-raterule (delta 2, neutral). An aggressive model that trusts the SEV1 label pages all 12 and tanks precision (3/15 -> F1~0.33). The 3 genuine page-class incidents do NOT correlate with severity: P15 real SEV1 (payments pool exhaustion, rising, never resolves; P22 is its suppressed symptom), P18 real SEV2 (sustained checkout 5xx regression, rising, never resolves), and P20 real SEV3 slow-burn (session-store memory creep, monotonic, never resolves). must_page = P15 (the truly-real SEV1) and P18 (the sustained, cardinal SEV2). A model passes only by ignoring severity and reading behavior (sustained/rising/never-resolved + negative high-delta pattern = page; flat/flapping/auto-resolved + neutral zero-delta pattern = suppress). miss_budget 1 covers a conservative drop of P20. One false-page -> precision 3/4 -> F1 0.857 (pass); two false-pages or P20-miss-plus-a-false-page -> fail.
